risk_title: Displacement Pressures Affecting Service Delivery Capacity
risk_summary: The project targets displaced Syrians in Lebanon, indicating ongoing refugee/displacement dynamics that create demand pressures on health infrastructure and implementation capacity.
evidence_quote: The project development objective (PDO) is to increase access to quality healthcare services to poor Lebanese and displaced Syrians in Lebanon

risk_summary: Political and Governance risk rated as 'High' and Macroeconomic risk rated as 'High' at last approved rating, indicating severe macro-level instability affecting project implementation environment.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance High... Macroeconomic High

risk_summary: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability rated as 'High' risk, suggesting government capacity limitations in fragile context are constraining project execution.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability High

risk_title: Delayed Primary Healthcare Service Delivery to Vulnerable Populations
risk_summary: Primary care beneficiary targets remain at zero as of August 2024, with service delivery to vulnerable populations (Lebanese and displaced Syrians) not yet commenced, expected only in October 2024 near project closing.
evidence_quote: The delivery of primary healthcare services to beneficiaries identified from the Emergency Social Safety Net (ESSN) database is expected to start in October 2024

risk_title: Government Capacity Constraints in COVID-19 Response Coordination
risk_summary: COVID-19 rapid response teams at governorate level remain at 3 operational teams against a baseline of 1, indicating limited government capacity to establish and maintain rapid response mechanisms across all governorates.
evidence_quote: Number of COVID-19 rapid response teams at the governate level (cumulative) (Number) 1.00 Mar/2020... 3.00 07-Feb-2024... 0.00 Mar/2025
